title: JKPSC Lecturer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: Jammu and Kashmir Public Service Commission (JKPSC)
shortInfo: Jammu and Kashmir Public Service Commission (JKPSC) has released the official Lecturer Recruitment 2026 at official website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced under the JKPSC Lecturer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between Max: 40 years with a qualification of Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology or relevant fields can apply online from 1 May 2026 to 31 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

basic_details.organization_name: Jammu and Kashmir Public Service Commission (JKPSC)
basic_details.short_information: Jammu and Kashmir Public Service Commission (JKPSC) has released the official Lecturer Recruitment 2026 at official website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced under the JKPSC Lecturer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between Max: 40 years with a qualification of Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology or relevant fields can apply online from 1 May 2026 to 31 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: OM: Not born after 01.01.2008, Not born before 01.01.1986 SC/ST-2: Not born after 01.01.2008, Not born before 01.01.1983 In Service Candidate/Government: Not born after 01.01.2008, Not born before 01.01.1986 Physical Challenged: Not born after 01.01.2008, Not born before 01.01.1982

qualification.details: Lecturer-I(Engineering), Electrical Engineering: Bachelor's Degree in Engineering with 55% marks in appropriate branch of Engineering/ Technology/disciplines or equivalent from recognized university. Lecturer-I(Engineering), Electronics & Communication.: Bachelor's degree with 55% marks in appropriate branch/discipline or equivalent from a recognized Institution/university. Lecturer-II(Non-Engineering), Food Technology: Bachelor's degree with 55% marks in appropriate branch/discipline or equivalent from a recognized Institution/university. Bachelor's degree in Arts/Science/Commerce with first class diploma in the relevant discipline from a recognized Institution/university. Diploma holders first class in appropriate branch/discipline from recognized Institution. Preference shall be given to the candidates from category (1). In case no candidate from this category is available then preference shall be given to the candidate from category (ii). In case no candidate is available from this category also then candidates from category (iii) shall be taken. Lecturer-I, Civil Engineering.: Bachelor's Degree in Engineering with 55% marks in appropriate branch of Engineering/ Technology/disciplines or equivalent from recognized university.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of JKPSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JKPSC Gazetted vacancies?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the JKPSC Gazetted vacancies is 31st May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this JKPSC recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 Gazetted vacancies in the Department of Skill Development announced by JKPSC.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a graduate degree, with specific professional qualifications mentioned for each post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these JKPSC posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for general candidates is 40 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the JKPSC Gazetted vacancies?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply online through the official JKPSC website by filling out the application form and paying the required fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the JKPSC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category: Rs.1200.00 for General, Rs.700.00 for Reserved Categories, and Nil for Physically Challenged Candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these JKPSC vacancies?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a Written Examination.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is available in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of JKPSC?
faq.answer: The official website of Jammu and Kashmir Public Service Commission is http://jkpsc.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates edit their application form after submission?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates can edit their application form between 1st June 2026 and 3rd June 2026.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the JKPSC Gazetted vacancies is 31st May 2026.
